title: Epoxy Garage Floor Coating - Elite South Texas
content:
Garage Floors
Our garage flooring systems provide a durable, slip resistant, stain resistant finish as a fluid applied resinous protective coating. Our coatings are specialty engineered to withstand petrochemicals, de-icing salts and freeze/thaw conditions. These systems are not thin-mil epoxy paint or DIY garage flooring kits, thus providing increased abrasion and impact resistance, and come in a variety of aesthetic options.
Advantages
Resistant to damage from water, de-icing salt, and petrochemicals
Impact and abrasion resistant
Slip resistant in wet or dry conditions for pedestrian and vehicular safety
Quick install options for minimal downtime
Easy to clean and maintain
For new construction and existing surfaces in need of repair and/or protection
Extreme temperature resistances including freeze/thaw conditions and extreme heat
Resistant to hot tire pickup
